title: Sealey Aluminium Mini Hand Torch, 3W COB LED, 500lm, Super Beam - LED500SB
features: SUPER BEAM - Features a super bright 3W COB LED producing 500 lumens which gives an even and constant spread of light.
MAGNETIC BASE - Features a magnet on the end, along with a metal belt clip on the back for hands-free operation.
LIGHTWEIGHT - 90mm in length and weighing just 57g the torch is easy for transportation and storage.
EASY TO USE - Press and hold the the side mounted push button for 500 lumens super beam or press to switch between two brightness settings of 100 or 300 lumens.
CHARGE INDICATOR - 600mAh lithium battery with easy to use charge indicator. Charges via supplied Micro USB charging cable (supplied).

ONE YEAR GUARANTEE FROM A REPUTABLE UK COMPANY – Founded in 1978, Sealey is a large family run business with a vast product range. Trusted by professionals, all Sealey products are thoroughly tested and backed by unrivalled aftersales service.
description: From the manufacturer This 3W COB LED light offers dual brightness settings of 100 or 300 lumens for versatile lighting. For an extra boost, press and hold the button to activate a powerful 500 lumen super beam. Features a magnet on the end, along with a metal belt clip on the back for hands-free operation. 600mAh lithium battery with charge indicator. Charges via Micro USB charging cable (supplied).
